summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MICRO Rivera Bus Tracker application. Backend APIs working perfectly with real-time bus data from external XML source. Frontend MapLibre GL JS implementation fully functional with all interactive features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend /api/ root endpoint returns correct message
Backend /api/buses endpoint returns real bus data with proper structure
Backend /api/lines endpoint returns available bus lines with colors
Frontend MapLibre GL JS map loads correctly
Bus markers appear on map with correct colors and positioning
Theme toggle switches between dark and light map styles successfully
Bus list panel opens and displays all active buses with details
Bus bottom sheet opens with complete bus information when clicking bus from list
Bus bottom sheet opens when clicking bus markers on map
Line filter dropdown filters buses by selected line correctly
Live update indicator displays and functions properly
Last update time shows current timestamp
Mobile responsive layout works correctly on 390x844 viewport
All controls accessible and functional on mobile devices

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and interactions working correctly
